Live.Application.Application.View.add_is.description:
Add a listener function or method, which will be called as soon as the
property "is_view_visible" has changed.

Live.Application.Application.View.hide_v.description: Hide one through the identifier string specified view.

Live.Application.Application.View.is_vie.description:
Returns true, if the given listener function or method is connected
to the property "is_view_visible".

Live.Application.Application.View.remove.description:
Remove a previously set listener function or method from
property "is_view_visible".

Live.Application.Application.View.scroll.description:
Scroll through the identifier string specified view into the given
direction, if possible. Will silently return if the specified view
can not perform the requested action.

Live.Application.Application.View.zoom_v.description:
Zoom through the identifier string specified view into the given
direction, if possible. Will silently return if the specified view
can not perform the requested action.

Live.Application.Application.has_option.description: Returns True if the given entry exists in Options.txt, False otherwise.

Live.Application.Application.press_curre.description: Press a button, by index, on the current message box.

Live.Application.Application.unavailable.raw_doc: List of features that are unavailable due to limitations of the current Live edition.

Live.Application.ControlDescriptionVecto.raw_doc: A container for returning control descriptions.

Live.Application.ControlSurfaceProxy.pad.raw_doc: The layout of pads on Push.

Live.Application.UnavailableFeatureVecto.raw_doc: A container for returning unavailable features.

Live.Application.encrypt_challenge.description: Returns an encrypted challenge based on the TEA algortithm

Live.Application.encrypt_challenge2.description: Returns the UMAC hash for the given challenge.

Live.Application.get_random_int.description: Returns a random integer from the given range.

Live.Base.FloatVector.raw_doc: A simple container for returning floats from Live.

Live.Base.IntU64Vector.raw_doc: A simple container for returning unsigned long integers from Live.

Live.Base.subst_args.cpp_signature: std::__1::basic_string<char, std::__1::char_traits<char>, std::__1::allocator<char>> subst_args(TText [,std::__1::basic_string<char, std::__1::char_traits<char>, std::__1::allocator<char>>='' [,std::__1::basic_string<char, std::__1::char_traits<char>, std::__1::allocator<char>>='' [,std::__1::basic_string<char, std::__1::char_traits<char>, std::__1::allocator<char>>='' [,std::__1::basic_string<char, std::__1::char_traits<char>, std::__1::allocator<char>>='' [,std::__1::basic_string<char, std::__1::char_traits<char>, std::__1::allocator<char>>='']]]]])

Live.Browser.Browser.relation_to_hotswap.description: Returns the relation between the given browser item and the current hotswap target

Live.Browser.BrowserItem.iter_children.raw_doc: Const iterable access to the descendants of this browser item.

Live.Browser.BrowserItemIterator.raw_doc: This class iterates over children of another BrowserItem.

Live.Chain.Chain.duplicate_device.description: Duplicate the device at the given index in the chain.

Live.Chain.Chain.insert_device.description: Add a device at a given index in the chain. At end if -1.

Live.Clip.Clip.View.select_envelope_para.description: Select the given device parameter in the envelope view.

Live.Clip.Clip.add_new_notes.description:
Expects a Python iterable holding a number of Live.Clip.MidiNoteSpecification
objects. The objects will be used to construct new notes in the clip.
Live.Clip.Clip.add_new_notes.cpp_signature: std::__1::vector<unsigned long long, std::__1::allocator<unsigned long long>> add_new_notes(TPyHandle<AClip>,boost::python::api::object)

Live.Clip.Clip.add_warp_marker.description:
Available for AudioClips only.
Adds the specified warp marker, if possible.

Live.Clip.Clip.apply_note_modifications.description:
Expects a list of notes as returned from get_notes_extended. The content
of the list will be used to modify existing notes in the clip, based on
matching note IDs.
This function should be used when modifying existing notes, e.g. changing the
velocity or start time. The function ensures that per-note events attached to
the modified notes are preserved. This is NOT the case when replacing notes
via a combination of remove_notes_extended and add_new_notes.
The given list can be a subset of the notes in the clip, but it must not
contain any notes that are not present in the clip.

Live.Clip.Clip.automation_envelope.description: Return the envelope for the given parameter.Returns None if the envelope doesn't exist.Returns None for Arrangement clips.Returns None for parameters from a different track.

Live.Clip.Clip.clear_envelope.description: Clears the envelope of this clips given parameter.

Live.Clip.Clip.create_automation_envelop.description: Creates an envelope for a given parameter and returns it.This should only be used if the envelope doesn't exist.Raises an error if the envelope can't be created.

Live.Clip.Clip.duplicate_notes_by_id.description:
Duplicate all notes matching the given note IDs.
If the optional destination_time is not provided, new notes will be inserted
after the last selected note. This behavior can be observed when duplicating
notes in the Live GUI.
If the transposition_amount is specified, the notes in the region will be
transposed by the number of semitones.
Raises an error on audio clips.
Live.Clip.Clip.duplicate_notes_by_id.cpp_signature: std::__1::vector<unsigned long long, std::__1::allocator<unsigned long long>> duplicate_notes_by_id(TPyHandle<AClip>,boost::python::api::object [,boost::python::api::object=None [,int=0]])

Live.Clip.Clip.get_notes.description:
Returns a tuple of tuples where each inner tuple represents
a note starting in the given pitch- and time range.
The inner tuple contains pitch, time, duration, velocity, and mute state.

Live.Clip.Clip.get_notes_by_id.description: Return a list of MIDI notes matching the given note IDs.

Live.Clip.Clip.get_selected_notes.description:
Returns a tuple of tuples where each inner tuple
represents a selected note. The inner tuple contains
pitch, time, duration, velocity, and mute state.

Live.Clip.Clip.move_playing_pos.description:
Jump forward or backward by the specified relative amount in beats.
Will do nothing, if the Clip is not playing.

Live.Clip.Clip.quantize.description: Quantize all notes in a clip or align warp markers.

Live.Clip.Clip.quantize_pitch.description: Quantize all the notes of a given pitch. Raises an error on audio clips.

Live.Clip.Clip.remove_notes.description: Delete all notes starting in the given pitch- and time range.

Live.Clip.Clip.remove_notes_by_id.description:
Delete all notes matching the given note IDs.
This function should NOT be used to implement modification of existing notes
(i.e. in combination with add_new_notes), as that leads to loss of per-note
events. apply_note_modifications must be used instead for modifying existing
notes.

Live.Clip.Clip.replace_selected_notes.description:
Called with a tuple of tuples where each inner tuple represents
a note in the same format as returned by get_selected_notes. The
notes described that way will then be used to replace the old selection.

Live.Clip.Clip.select_notes_by_id.description: Selects all notes matching the given note IDs.

Live.Clip.Clip.set_fire_button_state.description: Set the clip's fire button state directly. Supports all launch modes.

Live.Clip.Clip.set_notes.description:
Called with a tuple of tuples where each inner tuple represents
a note in the same format as returned by get_notes. The
notes described that way will then be added to the clip.

Live.ClipSlot.ClipSlot.create_audio_clip.description:
Creates an audio clip referencing the file at the given absolute path in the slot.
Throws an error when called on non-empty slots or slots in non-audio or frozen tracks, or when the path doesn't point at a valid audio file.

Live.ClipSlot.ClipSlot.duplicate_clip_to.description:
Duplicates the slot's clip to the passed in target slot.
Overrides the target's clip if it's not empty.
Raises an exception if the (source) slot itself is empty, or if source and
target have different track types (audio vs. MIDI). Also raises if the source
or target slot is in a group track (so called group slot).

Live.ClipSlot.ClipSlot.set_fire_button_s.description: Set the clipslot's fire button state directly. Supports all launch modes.

Live.Conversions.move_devices_on_track_t.description:
Moves the entire device chain of the track according to the track index
onto the C1 (note 36) drum pad of a new drum rack in a new track.If the track associated with the track index does not contain any devices
nothing changes (i.e. a new track and new drum rack are not created).

Live.Device.Device.store_chosen_bank.description: Set the selected bank in the device for persistency.

Live.DeviceParameter.DeviceParameter.str.description:
Return a string representation of the given value. To be used
for display purposes only. This value can include characters like 'db' or
'hz', depending on the type of the parameter.

Live.Envelope.Envelope.delete_events_in_.description: Deletes the events in the specified time range.

Live.Envelope.Envelope.events_in_range.description: Returns the events in the specified time range.

Live.Envelope.Envelope.insert_step.description: Given a start time, a step length and a value, creates a step in the envelope.

Live.Envelope.Envelope.value_at_time.description: Returns the parameter value at the specified time.

Live.Licensing.PythonLicensingBridge.bas.raw_doc: Returns Live's current base product ID.

Live.Licensing.PythonLicensingBridge.get.description: Retrieves an instance of the startup dialog with the passed callables connected to its buttons.

Live.Licensing.PythonLicensingBridge.lic.raw_doc: Returns a bool indicating if we require the license information returned by the server to match the variant of Live.

Live.Licensing.PythonLicensingBridge.ran.raw_doc: Returns the integer to send along with the Trial authorization request. This same integer will be checked for in `process_trial_response` (and then changed).

Live.Licensing.PythonLicensingBridge.set.raw_doc: Returns true if the set has unsaved changes.

Live.Licensing.PythonLicensingBridge.set.description: Starts or stops a timer meant for driving network operations. Pass None as callback to stop the timer. If any callback invocation raises an exception, the timer is stopped.

Live.Licensing.get_unlock_dir.description: Returns a tuple containing the unlock file directory and a flag indicating if the unlock file is in the system domain.

Live.Listener.ListenerHandle.listener_se.raw_doc: Returns the weak reference to original self, if it was a bound method

Live.Listener.ListenerHandle.name.raw_doc: Prints the name of the property that this listener is connected to

Live.Listener.ListenerVector.raw_doc: A read only container for accessing a list of listeners.

Live.LooperDevice.LooperDevice.export_to.description: Export Looper's content to a Session Clip Slot.

Live.MaxDevice.MaxDevice.get_bank_name.description: Get the name of a parameter bank given by index. This is related to hardware control surfaces.

Live.MaxDevice.MaxDevice.get_bank_parame.description: Get the indices of parameters of the given bank index. Empty slots are marked as -1. Bank index -1 refers to the best-of bank. This function is related to hardware control surfaces.

Live.MaxDevice.MaxDevice.get_value_item_.description: Get a list of icon identifier strings for a list parameter's values.An empty string is given where no icon should be displayed.An empty list is given when no icons should be displayed.This is related to hardware control surfaces.

Live.MaxDevice.MaxDevice.is_using_compar.raw_doc: Returns whether the Device has loaded the preset in compare slot B. Only relevant if can_compare_ab, otherwise errors.

Live.PluginDevice.PluginDevice.is_using_.raw_doc: Returns whether the Device has loaded the preset in compare slot B. Only relevant if can_compare_ab, otherwise errors.

Live.RackDevice.RackDevice.copy_pad.description: Copies all contents of a drum pad from a source pad into a destination pad. copy_pad(source_index, destination_index) where source_index and destination_index correspond to the note number/index of the drum pad in a drum rack. Throws an exception when the source pad is empty, or when the source or destination indices are not between 0 - 127.

Live.RackDevice.RackDevice.insert_chain.description: Inserts a new chain, either at the specified index or, if not index was specified, at the end of the chain sequence.

Live.RackDevice.RackDevice.is_using_comp.raw_doc: Returns whether the Device has loaded the preset in compare slot B. Only relevant if can_compare_ab, otherwise errors.

Live.Sample.Sample.slices.raw_doc: Access to the list of slice points in sample time in the sample.

Live.Scene.Scene.set_fire_button_state.description: Set the scene's fire button state directly. Supports all launch modes.

Live.Song.Song.create_audio_track.description:
Create a new audio track at the optional given index and return it.If the index is -1,
the new track is added at the end. It will create a default audio track if possible.
If the index is invalid or the new track would exceed the limitations, a limitation error is raised.If the index is missing, the track is created after the last selected item

Live.Song.Song.create_midi_track.description:
Create a new midi track at the optional given index and return it.If the index is -1,
the new track is added at the end.It will create a default midi track if possible.
If the index is invalid or the new track would exceed the limitations, a limitation error is raised.If the index is missing, the track is created after the last selected item

Live.Song.Song.create_scene.description:
Create a new scene at the given index. If the index is -1,
the new scene is added at the end. If the index is invalid or
the new scene would exceed the limitations, a limitation error is raised.

Live.Song.Song.delete_return_track.description:
Delete the return track with the given index. If no track with this index
exists, an exception will be raised.

Live.Song.Song.delete_scene.description:
Delete the scene with the given index. If no scene with this index
exists, an exception will be raised.

Live.Song.Song.delete_track.description:
Delete the track with the given index. If no track with this index
exists, an exception will be raised.

Live.Song.Song.duplicate_scene.description:
Duplicates a scene and selects the new one.
Raises a limitation error if creating a new scene would exceed the limitations.

Live.Song.Song.duplicate_track.description:
Duplicates a track and selects the new one.
If the track is inside a folded group track, the group track is unfolded.
Raises a limitation error if creating a new track would exceed the limitations.

Live.Song.Song.find_device_position.description:
Returns the closest possible position to the given target, where the
device can be inserted. If inserting is not possible at all (i.e. if
the device type is wrong), -1 is returned.

Live.Song.Song.get_current_smpte_song_ti.description:
Get const access to the songs current playing position, by specifying
the SMPTE format in which you would like to receive the time.

Live.Song.Song.get_data.description: Get data for the given key, that was previously stored using set_data.

Live.Song.Song.jump_by.description: Set a new playing pos, relative to the current one.

Live.Song.Song.move_device.description: Move a device into the target at the given position, where 0 moves it before the first device and len(devices) moves it to the end of the device chain.If the device cannot be moved to this position, the nearest possible position is chosen. If the device type is not valid, a runtime error is raised.Returns the index, where the device was moved to.

Live.Song.Song.scrub_by.description: Same as jump_by, but does not stop playback.

Live.Song.Song.set_data.description: Store data for the given key in this object. The data is persistent and will be restored when loading the Live Set.

Live.Song.get_all_scales_ordered.description: Get an ordered tuple of tuples of all available scale names to intervals.

Live.TakeLane.TakeLane.create_audio_clip.description:
Creates an audio clip referencing the file at the given path and inserts it into the arrangement at the specified time.
Throws an error when called on a non-audio or a frozen track, when the specified time is outside the [0., 1576800.] range, when the track is currently being recorded into, or when the path doesn't point to a valid audio file.

Live.TakeLane.TakeLane.create_midi_clip.description:
Creates an empty MIDI clip and inserts it into the arrangement at the specified time.
Throws an error when called on a non-MIDI track or a frozen track, when the specified time is outside the [0., 1576800.] range, or when the track is currently being recorded into.

Live.Track.Track.create_audio_clip.description:
Creates an audio clip referencing the file at the given path and inserts it into the arrangement at the specified time.
Throws an error when called on a non-audio or a frozen track, when the specified time is outside the [0., 1576800.] range, when the track is currently being recorded into, or when the path doesn't point to a valid audio file.

Live.Track.Track.create_midi_clip.description:
Creates an empty MIDI clip and inserts it into the arrangement at the specified time.
Throws an error when called on a non-MIDI track or a frozen track, when the specified time is outside the [0., 1576800.] range, or when the track is currently being recorded into.

Live.Track.Track.create_take_lane.description: Create a new TakeLane for this track.

Live.Track.Track.duplicate_clip_slot.description:
Duplicate a clip and put it into the next free slot and return the index
of the destination slot. A new scene is created if no free slot is
available. If creating the new scene would exceed the limitations,
a runtime error is raised.

Live.Track.Track.duplicate_device.description: Duplicate a device at a given index in the 'devices' list.

Live.Track.Track.get_data.description: Get data for the given key, that was previously stored using set_data.

Live.Track.Track.insert_device.description: Add a device at a given index in the 'devices' list. At end if -1.

Live.Track.Track.jump_in_running_session.description:
Jump forward or backward in the currently running Sessionclip (if any)
by the specified relative amount in beats. Does nothing if no Session Clip
is currently running.

Live.Track.Track.set_data.description: Store data for the given key in this object. The data is persistent and will be restored when loading the Live Set.
